MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Pro Per Executor to appear on February 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition to close the Estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
